message:
fix(stream): soften Collect, Count, and ForEach repoll guards from panic to cached-value return

Replace assert!(!completed) panics with if-completed-return-cached
pattern in three stream terminal combinators, consistent with fused
future/stream conventions where repolling after completion should be
safe rather than crashing the runtime.

Collect: repoll returns C::default() (empty collection) instead of
panicking. Since the real result was already returned on the first
Ready, returning an empty default is unambiguous.

Count: repoll returns the cached total count instead of panicking.
Rename tests from _panics to _returns_cached_total/_returns_zero,
replace catch_unwind with direct assertion on Poll::Ready value.

ForEach / ForEachAsync: repoll returns Poll::Ready(()) instead of
panicking. Update both sync and async variants. Rename tests from
_panics to _returns_ready, replace catch_unwind with direct match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
